TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Atayal, story: AtaNr-dailylife2_Iwan
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: minaniq samiyan la ga la musa'sami kumayi' su quriyux la ru.
S.PHON: minaniq s~ɕamijan la ɣa la mus~ɕaʔs~ɕami kumajiʔ s~ɕu qurijux la ru.
S.FORM: minaniq samiyan la ga la musa'sami kumayi' su quriyux la ru.
S.PHON: minaniq s~ɕamijan la ɣa la mus~ɕaʔs~ɕami kumajiʔ s~ɕu qurijux la ru.
S.TRANSL: 過完年後,我們去挖生薑.
After the new year, we go to dig out the ginger.

S.FORM: ru taqru' i kumayi' su quriyux ga baqun su musa' tana' i pamuwaun la ga ga hawbingun la.
S.PHON: ru taqruʔ i kumajiʔ s~ɕu qurijux ɣa βaqun s~ɕu mus~ɕaʔ tanaʔ i pamuwaun la ɣa ɣa ħawβiŋun la.
S.FORM: ru taqru' i kumayi' su quriyux ga baqun su musa' tana' i pamuwaun la ga ga hawbingun la.
S.PHON: ru taqruʔ i kumajiʔ s~ɕu qurijux ɣa βaqun s~ɕu mus~ɕaʔ tanaʔ i pamuwaun la ɣa ɣa ħawβiŋun la.
S.TRANSL: 生薑挖完,知道到達夠種的數量後,就把他們切塊.

TRANSL.notes: (We) finish digging out the ginger, and when the amount is known to be enough for planting, we have them cut.

S.TRANSL: finish digging out the ginger, and when the amount is known to be enough for planting, we have them cut.

S.FORM: hawbingun la ru ru taqaruunniya' hawbingun la ga halan mamuwa' la ru.
S.PHON: ħawβiŋun la ru ru taqaruunnijaʔ ħawβiŋun la ɣa ħalan mamuwaʔ la ru.
S.FORM: hawbingun la ru ru taqaruunniya' hawbingun la ga halan mamuwa' la ru.
S.PHON: ħawβiŋun la ru ru taqaruunnijaʔ ħawβiŋun la ɣa ħalan mamuwaʔ la ru.
S.TRANSL: 切塊切完後,就把他們拿去種.
After they are cut, they're taken to be planted.

S.FORM: taqaru' i sami i mamuwa' la ga sumliyatcami su iri'iri' la palikaway ayutak.
S.PHON: taqaruʔ i s~ɕami i mamuwaʔ la ɣa s~ɕumlijatʦ~ʨami s~ɕu iriʔiriʔ la palikawaj ajutak.
S.FORM: taqaru' i sami i mamuwa' la ga sumliyatcami su iri'iri' la palikaway ayutak.
S.PHON: taqaruʔ i s~ɕami i mamuwaʔ la ɣa s~ɕumlijatʦ~ʨami s~ɕu iriʔiriʔ la palikawaj ajutak.
S.TRANSL: 我們種完後,幫作物除草,好比李子、橘子.

TRANSL.notes: After we plant them, we cut the grass (growing) around the crops, (like) plums and oranges.

S.TRANSL: After we plant them, we cut the grass around the crops, plums and oranges.

S.FORM: anananu' ku waw ga sal saliyatan ru skuan xiliyu'.
S.PHON: anananuʔ ku waw ɣa s~ɕal s~ɕalijatan ru s~ɕkuan xilijuʔ.
S.FORM: anananu' ku waw ga sal saliyatan ru skuan xiliyu'.
S.PHON: anananuʔ ku waw ɣa s~ɕal s~ɕalijatan ru s~ɕkuan xilijuʔ.
S.TRANSL: 包含除草、施肥等各種工作.

TRANSL.notes: (We do) many kinds of work, like cutting grass and adding fertilizer.

S.TRANSL: many kinds of work, like cutting grass and adding fertilizer.

S.FORM: ru i taqaru' i taqarunniyam ku wawniyam la ga talan ru ki'man ku quriyuxniyam la ga musa'sami i halanniyam tumuba' ru su skuan su xiliyu'.
S.PHON: ru i taqaruʔ i taqarunnijam ku wawnijam la ɣa talan ru kiʔman ku qurijuxnijam la ɣa mus~ɕaʔs~ɕami i ħalannijam tumuβaʔ ru s~ɕu s~ɕkuan s~ɕu xilijuʔ.
S.FORM: ru i taqaru' i taqarunniyam ku wawniyam la ga talan ru ki'man ku quriyuxniyam la ga musa'sami i halanniyam tumuba' ru su skuan su xiliyu'.
S.PHON: ru i taqaruʔ i taqarunnijam ku wawnijam la ɣa talan ru kiʔman ku qurijuxnijam la ɣa mus~ɕaʔs~ɕami i ħalannijam tumuβaʔ ru s~ɕu s~ɕkuan s~ɕu xilijuʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 而且,我們完成我們的工作之後,看到我們的生薑長草,我們會去噴藥(除草劑),並且施肥.

S.TRANSL: 而且,我們完成我們的工作之後,看到我們的生薑長草,我們會去噴藥 ,並且施肥.
And, after we finish our work, when seeing grass growing around our ginger, we'll go to spray insecticide and add fertilizer.

S.FORM: ru i taqaruun ku waw la ga musa' sumliyat cu alan su ali' gi.
S.PHON: ru i taqaruun ku waw la ɣa mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕumlijat ʦ~ʨu alan s~ɕu aliʔ ɣi.
S.FORM: ru i taqaruun ku waw la ga musa' sumliyat cu alan su ali' gi.
S.PHON: ru i taqaruun ku waw la ɣa mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕumlijat ʦ~ʨu alan s~ɕu aliʔ ɣi.

TRANSL.notes: 當工作完成後,(我們會)去砍草並採竹筍.

S.TRANSL: 當工作完成後, 去砍草並採竹筍.

TRANSL.notes: When all the work is finished, (we'll) go to cut grass and gather bamboo shoots.

S.TRANSL: When all the work is finished, go to cut grass and gather bamboo shoots.

S.FORM: tiku asi syue syue hani la ga sipayat cu buwating hani la ga usu i i ta'ali' la ru musa' sumliyat ru taqaruun sumlyat la ga luma talan ru kiya ku ali' la ga mana'aring i tabalku' la.
S.PHON: tiku as~ɕi s~ɕjue s~ɕjue ħani la ɣa s~ɕipajat ʦ~ʨu βuwatiŋ ħani la ɣa us~ɕu i i taʔaliʔ la ru mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕumlijat ru taqaruun s~ɕumljat la ɣa luma talan ru kija ku aliʔ la ɣa manaʔariŋ i taβalkuʔ la.
S.FORM: tiku asi syue syue hani la ga sipayat cu buwating hani la ga usu i i ta'ali' la ru musa' sumliyat ru taqaruun sumlyat la ga luma talan ru kiya ku ali' la ga mana'aring i tabalku' la.
S.PHON: tiku as~ɕi s~ɕjue s~ɕjue ħani la ɣa s~ɕipajat ʦ~ʨu βuwatiŋ ħani la ɣa us~ɕu i i taʔaliʔ la ru mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕumlijat ru taqaruun s~ɕumljat la ɣa luma talan ru kija ku aliʔ la ɣa manaʔariŋ i taβalkuʔ la.

TRANSL.notes: 就像這個四月,我們會去採竹筍,而且會去砍草.然後砍完草之後,(如果)看到有竹筍,就開始採竹筍.

S.TRANSL: 就像這個四月,我們會去採竹筍,而且會去砍草.然後砍完草之後, 看到有竹筍,就開始採竹筍.

TRANSL.notes: Just like this April, (we) would gather bamboo shoots, and go to cut grass. And after cutting the grass, (if we) see there are bamboo shoots, we'll start to gather them.

S.TRANSL: Just like this April, would gather bamboo shoots, and go to cut grass. And after cutting the grass, see there are bamboo shoots, we'll start to gather them.
